records.question: How many bookings have at least 3 products booked, a discount of at least 48.73, a status date on or after 2018-03-22 00:16:58, and ended on or after 2017-10-02 07:28:09?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN products_booked ON bookings.booking_id = products_booked.booking_id
JOIN view_product_availability ON bookings.booking_id = view_product_availability.booking_id
WHERE products_booked.booked_count >= 3 AND bookings.amount_of_discount >= 48.73 AND view_product_availability.status_date >= '2018-03-22 00:16:58' AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.booking_id
FROM Bookings AS T1
INNER JOIN Products_Booked AS T2
  ON T1.booking_id = T2.booking_id
INNER JOIN View_Product_Availability AS T3
  ON T1.booking_id = T3.booking_id
WHERE
  T1.amount_of_discount >= 48.73 AND T3.status_date >= '2018-03-22 00:16:58' AND T1.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09'
GROUP BY
  T1.booking_id
HAVING
  COUNT(T2.product_id) >= 3

records.question: How many bookings started on or after 2017-05-24 16:16:29 and ended on or after 2018-03-07 17:39:04, with no damage returned, an amount payable of at most 374.59, and a refund amount of at most 130.87, made by male customers with last name Terry who became customers on or before 2015-05-05 20:29:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_refund <= 130.87 AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2015-05-05 20:29:01' AND customers.gender_mf = '1' AND bookings.booking_start_date >= '2017-05-24 16:16:29' AND bookings.amount_payable <= 374.59 AND customers.last_name = 'Terry' AND bookings.returned_damaged_yn = '0' AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2018-03-07 17:39:04'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.booking_id
FROM Bookings AS T1
INNER JOIN Customers AS T2
  ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
WHERE
  T1.booking_start_date >= '2017-05-24 16:16:29' AND T1.booking_end_date >= '2018-03-07 17:39:04' AND T1.returned_damaged_yn = 'No' AND T1.amount_payable <= 374.59 AND T1.amount_of_refund <= 130.87 AND T2.gender_mf = 'M' AND T2.last_name = 'Terry' AND T2.date_became_customer <= '2015-05-05 20:29:01'

records.question: Which bookings were returned damaged, have a Provisional booking status, ended on or after 2017-10-02 07:28:09, with a count hired of 488, an amount of discount exactly 48.73, amount outstanding exactly 73.88, an amount payable of at most 273.28, and an amount of refund at most 181.19?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
WHERE bookings.amount_payable <= 273.28 AND bookings.booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09' AND bookings.returned_damaged_yn = '1' AND bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND bookings.count_hired = '488' AND bookings.amount_of_discount = 48.73 AND bookings.amount_outstanding = 73.88 AND bookings.amount_of_refund <= 181.19
records.pred_sql: SELECT booking_id FROM Bookings WHERE returned_damaged_yn = 'Yes' AND booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND booking_end_date >= '2017-10-02 07:28:09' AND count_hired = '488' AND amount_of_discount = 48.73 AND amount_outstanding = 73.88 AND amount_payable <= 273.28 AND amount_of_refund <= 181.19

records.question: Which bookings have a refund amount at most 161.9 and are associated with customers and products booked?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN products_booked ON bookings.booking_id = products_booked.booking_id
WHERE bookings.amount_of_refund <= 161.9
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.booking_id FROM Bookings AS T1 INNER JOIN Products_Booked AS T2 ON T1.booking_id = T2.booking_id WHERE T1.amount_of_refund <= 161.9

records.question: Which bookings have a Provisional status with an amount payable of 306.26, made by good male customers who received at least 78.31 in discount, and had payments of at most 307.14 on or before 2018-03-03 14:22:51?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN payments ON bookings.booking_id = payments.booking_id
WHERE payments.payment_date <= '2018-03-03 14:22:51' AND bookings.amount_of_discount >= 78.31 AND customers.good_or_bad_customer = 'good' AND payments.amount_paid <= 307.14 AND customers.gender_mf = '1' AND bookings.booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND bookings.amount_payable = 306.26
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.booking_id FROM Bookings AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id INNER JOIN Payments AS T3 ON T1.booking_id = T3.booking_id WHERE T1.booking_status_code = 'Provisional' AND T1.amount_payable = 306.26 AND T2.good_or_bad_customer = 'Good' AND T2.gender_mf = 'M' AND T1.amount_of_discount >= 78.31 AND T3.amount_paid <= 307.14 AND T3.payment_date <= '2018-03-03 14:22:51'

records.question: Which bookings for customers with last name Strosin ended exactly on 2017-12-02 00:37:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT bookings.booking_id FROM bookings
JOIN customers ON bookings.customer_id = customers.customer_id
JOIN discount_coupons ON customers.coupon_id = discount_coupons.coupon_id
WHERE customers.last_name = 'Strosin' AND bookings.booking_end_date = '2017-12-02 00:37:00'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.booking_id FROM Bookings AS T1 INNER JOIN Customers AS T2 ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id WHERE T2.last_name = 'Strosin' AND T1.booking_end_date = '2017-12-02 00:37:00'
